## Summary

Describe the user-visible or maintainability change and why it belongs in this repository.

## Scope

- [ ] The change is focused and stays within the documented runtime boundary.
- [ ] I updated relevant tests or explained why no test change is needed.
- [ ] I did not include private addresses, location data, credentials, or generated runtime data.

## Verification

List the commands and relevant browser checks you ran.

## Screenshots

For UI changes, include desktop and mobile screenshots or explain why they are not applicable.
